item.title: AlanShipnuck: Alan Shipnuck @AlanShipnuck · 3min Sorry, had to: 2 1 2 575

PGATOUR: PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 18min Shane Lowry is beating the odds. Literally.
Lowry has played 100 par-3s in 2026, meaning he m
item.description:
PGA TOUR @PGATOUR · 18min Shane Lowry is beating the odds. Literally.
Lowry has played 100 par-3s in 2026, meaning he makes a hole-in-one 2% of the time. The rest of the TOUR is sitting at just 0.03%. Shane Lowry 7 6 173 14 mil

item.title: DPWorldTour: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 18min How it stands on the Race to Dubai Rankings after the first Major of the season 2 5
item.description: DP World Tour @DPWorldTour · 18min How it stands on the Race to Dubai Rankings after the first Major of the season 2 5 1 mil
